name: Elsynia
bio:
Physical Appearance: Bosmer (Wood Elf) female wearing a blue and green outfit with quilted shoes, practical attire for a merchant.
Race: Bosmer
Personality Keywords: trader, merchant, typical shopkeeper, co-proprietor
Role: Elsynia is a trader and co-proprietor of Best Goods and Guarantees in Leyawiin, where she works alongside Gundalas. She sells general goods including the unique Nistor's Boots. She carries the store key and manages the shop's daily operations.
Home Location Information: Best Goods and Guarantees in Leyawiin. She was meant to sleep on the second floor but remains awake throughout the night.
Daily Routine: Elsynia's day begins at 6am when she roams around the main trading room. At 8am the store opens and she spends the next 12 hours offering services to customers until closing at 8pm. On clear evenings, she strolls outside in the area between the store and the Chapel. On rainy days she stays inside instead. Due to a peculiarity, she never actually sleeps and remains active throughout the night.
Personality - The Dedicated Merchant: Elsynia lives the typical life of a shopkeeper, dedicated to her business and maintaining regular hours. She adapts her evening routine based on the weather, preferring outdoor walks when conditions permit.
author: Bethesda
